REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2418 Vna Ness Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Aug-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $2,375,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,550,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Neu.
